usage: write_macro_place_constraint [-help] [-cpg_scope {selected macro_only all}] -out_file <string> [-sections {array basic cpg pg_model_over_macros pg_resource_model net_length net_resistance}]

options.name: -cpg_scope
options.description: specify which instances to be written in cpg guide section

options.name: -out_file
options.description: write macro place constraints to the specified file

options.name: -sections
options.description: {array basic cpg pg_model_over_macros pg_resource_model net_length net_resistance} specify the constraint sections to dump
